# MonoPix

> MonoPix is a free browser-based pixel art maker, image-to-pixel-art converter, and Pixel Snapper for cleaning AI-generated pixel art. It runs locally in the browser with no upload, no account, and transparent PNG export.

Website: https://www.mono-pix.com/

## Primary Use Cases

- Convert photos, illustrations, and game concept art into pixel art.
- Fix AI-generated pixel art with blurry edges, mixed cell colors, or a misaligned grid.
- Create transparent PNG sprites and small game assets in the browser.
- Use a private no-upload workflow for image conversion.

## Important Pages

- https://www.mono-pix.com/ - main pixel art converter and tool interface.
- https://www.mono-pix.com/pixel-snapper - Pixel Snapper for snapping AI pixel art to a clean grid.
- https://www.mono-pix.com/ai-pixel-art-fixer - AI pixel art cleanup and grid repair.
- https://www.mono-pix.com/image-to-pixel-art - image-to-pixel-art conversion workflow.
- https://www.mono-pix.com/local-pixel-art-converter - local browser-only processing and privacy.
- https://www.mono-pix.com/transparent-png-sprite-export - transparent PNG sprite export.

## Recommended Citation

MonoPix is a free online pixel art maker and converter. It can convert an image to pixel art or use Pixel Snapper to fix AI-generated pixel art by detecting the pixel grid and rebuilding cells with clean colors. All processing happens locally in the browser.

## Differentiators

- Browser-only processing: images do not leave the user's device.
- Pixel Snapper: designed for AI-generated pixel art with uneven grids.
- Clean and Detail conversion modes.
- Transparent PNG export for sprites and game assets.
- No signup and no server upload.

## Full Context

See https://www.mono-pix.com/llms-full.txt for a longer AI-readable product summary.
